title: The Delhi Sikh Gurdwaras Act, 1971
full_text: The Delhi Sikh Gurdwaras Act, 1971 दिल्‍ली सिख गुरुद्वारा अधिनियम,1971 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1971-82 Act Number: 82 Enactment Date: 1971-12-30 Act Year: 1971 Short Title: The Delhi Sikh Gurdwaras Act, 1971 Hindi Title: दिल्‍ली सिख गुरुद्वारा अधिनियम,1971 Long Title: An Act to provide for the proper management of the Sikh Gurdwaras and Gurdwara property in Delhi and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 07-04-1972 Notification: 7th April, 1972, vide notification No. G.S.R. 241(E), dated 7th April, 1972, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3 (i). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Delhi Sikh Gurdwaras Act, 1971 PART I PRELIMINARY PART II THE COMMITTEE PART III POWERS AND FUNCTIONS OF THE COMMITTEE PART IV GURDWARA FUND, ACCOUNTS AND AUDIT PART V SETTLEMENT OF ELECTIONS AND OTHER DISPUTES PART VI MISCELANEOUS Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Incorporation of the Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Composition of the Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Term of office. Section 6. Delimitation of wards. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Electoral roll. Section 8. Qualifications of elector. Section 9. Right to vote. Section 10. Qualifications of member. Show Related Subordinates Section 11. Elections. Section 12. Publication of results. Section 13. Director Gurdwara Elections. Show Related Subordinates Section 14. First meeting of the elected members. Show Related Subordinates Section 15. First meeting of the Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 16. Election of office bearers. Show Related Subordinates Section 16A. Power to convene another meeting for election of office-bearers. Section 17. Vacation, resignation and removal of members and office-bearers. Show Related Subordinates Section 18. Fees and allowances of members. Show Related Subordinates Section 19. Meetings of the Committee and the Executive Board. Show Related Subordinates Section 20. Sub-committees. Section 21. Powers of the Executive Board and its office-bearers. Section 22. Validity of acts of Committee, Executive Board or sub-committees not to be questioned by reason of vacancy, etc. Show Related Subordinates Section 23. Officers and other employees of the Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 24. Powers and functions of the Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 25. Gurdwara Fund. Section 26. Prohibition regarding making of contributions for political purposes. Section 27. Budget. Show Related Subordinates Section 28. Maintenance of accounts. Show Related Subordinates Section 29. Audit of Accounts. Section 30. Consideration of the auditor’s report by the Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 31. Election disputes, electoral offences etc. Show Related Subordinates Section 32. Jurisdiction of District Court in other matters. Section 33. Appeals. Section 34. Procedure for affiliation of local Gurdwaras. Section 35. Act not to affect rites and practices of Sikh religion. Section 36. Members, officers and other employees to be public servants. Section 37. Salary, etc., of the Director Gurdwara Elections to be defrayed out of the Consolidated Fund of India in the first instance. Section 38. Protection of action taken. Section 39. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 40. Power of Committee to make regulations. Section 41. Repeal and Saving. Schedule 1.
